name: Asuna Kagurazaka
description: __Affiliations:__ Art Club As one of the main characters of the series, Asuna has been known to have quite a short temper and frequently her actions are a bit rash, but at the same time, has some aspects that display her maturity, especially when it comes to doing the right thing. Although at first she really detests Negi, over time she becomes like a big sister role model to him, as she does resemble Negi's cousin, Nekane, in a way.

name: Banri Settsu
description: He's the leader of the Autumn Troupe. He originally had no intention on participating in the Mankai Company audition for the Autumn Troupe and was just present to get his revenge for his defeat by the hands of Juza. Banri is an ultra high specs delinquent, who can not only handle sports and academics flawlessly but pretty much anything else, even acting.

name: G'raha Tia
description: A Student of Baldesion, G'raha Tia is a knowledgeable, if not slightly immature, Miqo'te with ties to the Crystal Tower. He originally had a single Allagan Eye, a special trait shared by Allagans with royal blood. Later, both of his eyes are Allagan Eyes and he seals himself in the Crystal Tower to prevent its dangerous knowledge from being obtained. name: Hae-Soo Lee
description: **Weight:** 58kg **Height** 176cm A freelance writer and columnist who often works under H magazine. Was hired to interview the photographer K about his latest works. Was the step-brother of Choi Joowon until their parents eventually divorced. Their relationship began while their parents were married together, and has continued on to the present timeline. ~!The reason for their parents divorce was because Haesoo’s mother caught the two together.!~

name: Hibiki Kuze
description: An ordinary third year high school student. On the way back from a mock exam he heads to the subway planning on going home, but gets caught up into a battle with demons. After the battle Hibiki gains the power to control demons along with Io and Daichi. Now in the middle of an extreme situation, Hibiki is dragged into fighting these mysterious invaders regardless of his intentions, but he will have to make a serious decision soon.

name: Hyun-Sung Lee
description: Lee Hyunsung is a former army lieutenant and a current member of Kim Dokja's party. He was originally a character in Ways of Survival, fighting under Yoo Joonghyuk's leadership.

name: Izumi Hashima

description: Jio Ba is a commander in the Duanghe Yang Army and one of the most notable warriors of the Chouga Tribe. Ba Jio was the only survivor from his tribe after a battle at a very young age. After a few years of living in the wild, he became a beast in human form. This would lead to confrontation with Duanhe Yang when she was on her way to conquer neighboring tribes. name: Jubei Kibagami
description: This character is a homage to the famed Japanese samurai folk hero Yagyu Jubei. He is a character created by Yoshiaki Kawajiri. He is a protagonist of the show. He is a wandering vagabond ninja who wants nothing to do but rest until one day, he got himself involved in a battle between the Hiruko and the Kimon Clan. name: Kaien Cross
description: Yuuki's adoptive parent, who also took Zero into his home several years ago. Headmaster Cross dreams of peace between humans and vampires, and established the Night Class to promote understanding between the two races. Although he is often eccentric, he has a serious side as well. It is revealed that he is a former vampire hunter. ~! Kaien Cross was considered "History's Greatest Legendary Vampire Hunter" though he refused being called that way. !~

name: Kanata Rivington
description: __Car:__ Toyota GT86 Kanata Rivington is a rookie racer who came to Japan from the United Kingdom in order to find his lost father. His mother is British, while his father is Japanese. He graduated from Royal Donington Park Racing School, a famous and prestigious racing school in the UK.

name: Kuugo Ginjou
description: __Race:__ Human/Fullbringer __Height:__ 187 cm __Role:__ Leader of Xcution, ~!First Shinigami Substitute (formerly)!~ Kuugo Ginjou is the leader of the mysterious organization, Xcution. Kuugo is a calm and cool-headed individual. He is quite manipulative, shown when he attempted to hire Ikumi Unagiya to do a background check on Isshin Kurosaki, intentionally doing so in front of Ichigo in order to get his attention.
